title: Generative Model Taxonomies
learning_outcomes: Compare autoregressive decoder-only architectures with encoder-decoder configurations.
Formulate RMSNorm mathematical steps and contrast them with standard LayerNorm.

content_sections.title: Generative Architecture Configurations
content_sections.content:
Large Language Models generally follow either a decoder-only (e.g. GPT, LLaMA) or encoder-decoder (e.g. T5, BART) configuration.

*   **Decoder-only Models:** Focus strictly on left-to-right next-token probability prediction (autoregressive), utilizing causal masking to block queries from looking ahead. They are highly optimized for generative text completion tasks.
*   **Encoder-decoder Models:** Encode the full bidirectional context first and pass it to a causal decoder via cross-attention. This is useful for sequence-to-sequence translation, summarization, and comprehension tasks where the full input context must be analyzed bidirectional before generation starts.

content_sections.title: RMSNorm and SwiGLU Derivations
content_sections.content:
To optimize inference latency, modern architectures replace standard LayerNorm with **Root Mean Square Normalization (RMSNorm)**. RMSNorm scales activation vectors by their root mean square value, bypassing mean subtraction computation steps:

$$\text{RMSNorm}(\mathbf{a}) = \frac{\mathbf{a}}{\text{RMS}(\mathbf{a})} \odot \mathbf{g}$$

where $\text{RMS}(\mathbf{a}) = \sqrt{\frac{1}{d} \sum_{i=1}^d a_i^2 + \epsilon}$ and $\mathbf{g}$ is a learnable scaling vector. This reduces memory bandwidth overhead by avoiding two sequential passes over data.

Additionally, feedforward blocks replace ReLU with **SwiGLU** activation functions. SwiGLU is a Gated Linear Unit (GLU) variation:

$$\text{SwiGLU}(\mathbf{x}) = \left( \mathbf{x}\mathbf{W}_1 \odot \text{swish}(\mathbf{x}\mathbf{W}_2) \right) \mathbf{W}_3$$

where $\text{swish}(\mathbf{z}) = \mathbf{z} \odot \sigma(\beta \mathbf{z})$ is the Swish activation. The gate mechanism improves optimization convergence during gradient updates.
